_note: Generic template — works for any Human-AI collaboration domain. Replace event_type values with your own action names.
_note_session_id: Required. Any unique identifier for this interaction session.
_note_baseline_s: Optional. Average time this task takes WITHOUT AI, in seconds. Powers the Effort Loss (EL) metric. Remove this key if not applicable.

decisions._note: Minimum viable AI event. Only interaction_id, timestamp, event_type, and actor_type are strictly required.
decisions._note_interaction_id: Required. Unique string ID for this event.
decisions._note_timestamp: Required. ISO 8601 date-time. All timing metrics depend on this.
decisions._note_event_type: Required. Name of the action. Use whatever names appear in your system logs.
decisions._note_actor_type: Required. 'ai' or 'human'. This single field unlocks all actor-level metrics.
decisions._note_latency_ms: Optional. AI response time in milliseconds. Include this for D and HCL metrics.
decisions._note_correct: Optional but recommended. Boolean — was the AI correct? Include this for Trust (Tr) metric.

decisions._note_duration_s: Optional. Human decision time in seconds. Include this for D and HCL metrics.

_note: Second session. Add as many sessions as you have. Each session = one complete task attempt.
